system.description: You ascend to dominance over the witches of Hallow. Following a long period of scheming or a single night of decisive action, you are now in charge of all the witches of Hallow. Such a force, when mobilised, is terrifying to behold: their true forms skitter and swarm across rooftops and in the shadows. Few can stand in their path and survive. After a session or two, the realities of being the head witch set in - there is a surprising amount of admin to do, and other witches are always coming to you with requests for aid. Pretty soon you're going to be interred in the Red Vaults beneath Hallow (as all the leaders of the witches are) to join the chorus of elders.
